items.title: US signs landmark nuclear deal with Saudi Arabia
items.summary: The US Department of Energy says the "peaceful" co-operation agreement will give US firms "great access" to the Saudi nuclear energy programme.

items.title: Houthis claim attack on oil tankers as US launches more strikes on Iran
items.summary: The Houthi attacks would be the first in the Red Sea since the Iran-backed group announced a "maritime embargo" against Saudi Arabia.

items.title: Thousands evacuated in France fires
items.summary: A third firefighter has died in Europe while tackling ongoing wildfires across the continent.

items.title: Retail spending fell in March as consumers pull back
items.summary: Spending at US retailers fell in March as consumers pulled back amid recessionary fears fueled by the banking crisis.

items.title: 東京Cool Biz進階版！男公務員穿短褲上班 女性抱怨「腿毛騷擾」

items.title: 東帝汶動土興建太陽能發電廠 力圖減輕對進口燃料的依賴
items.summary: 東帝汶23日為1座斥資數百萬美元的太陽能發電廠與能源儲存設施舉行動土儀式，期許藉此減輕該國對燃料進口的依賴。  該建案位於東帝汶馬納圖托（Manatuto）區，由法國電力能...…
